input.content:
---
name: Never commit RRA/security output files
description: RRA and security audit output files must never be committed to the repository
type: feedback
---

Never commit RRA* files (Rapid Risk Assessment outputs) or security audit tool outputs to the repository. These are internal-only artifacts.

**Why:** Security assessment outputs contain sensitive findings. They're for internal review, not public repos.
**How to apply:** After running appsec-tm or similar tools, review the output but do NOT git add any RRA* files or security report outputs. Add them to .gitignore if needed.

reason: No matching rule — falling back to default
